attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   SMPRLD.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY AS PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY,
   STMPRD.DISTRIBUTION_NUM AS BK_PR_LINE_DISTRIB_NUM_INT,
   NPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY AS PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY,
   NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS EXPENSE_OR_ASSET_GL_ACCT_KEY,
   'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
   STMPRD.ATTRIBUTE15 AS CIP_NUMER,
   STMPRD.COMPANY_A3 AS OFFSET_GLA_COMPANY_CD,
   STMPRD.LOCN_CD_A4 AS OFFSET_GLA_FINANCIAL_LOCN_CD,
   STMPRD.ACCT_CD_A6 AS OFFSET_GLA_FINANCIAL_ACCT_CD,
   STMPRD.PROJECT_CD_A8 AS OFFSET_GLA_PROJECT_CD,
   STMPRD.SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7 AS OFFSET_GLA_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
   STMPRD.DEPARTMENT_CD_A5 AS OFFSET_GLA_DEPARTMENT_CD,
   STMPRD.DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT,
   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD ,
COALESCE (STMPRD.ATTRIBUTE14,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ORIGINAL_DEPT_CD,
   COALESCE (NFD1.BK_COMPANY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_ORIGINAL_COMPANY_CD
  FROM
               (
     SELECT 
     DISTRIBUTION_ID,
     GLOBAL_NAME,
     DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
     SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
     CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
     ATTRIBUTE15,
     COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE3,'UNK') COMPANY_A3,
     COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE4,'UNK') LOCN_CD_A4,
     COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE6,'UNKNO') ACCT_CD_A6,
     COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE8,'UNKNOW') PROJECT_CD_A8,
     COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE7,'UNK') SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7,
     COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOW') DEPARTMENT_CD_A5,
     REQUISITION_LINE_ID,
	 ATTRIBUTE14 
     FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_REQ_DISTRIBUTI_ALL
    ) STMPRD  
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMPRD.GLOBAL_NAME)
    INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB SMPRLD
     ON (SMPRLD.SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT=STMPRD.DISTRIBUTION_ID
          AND SMPRLD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL
     ON (NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT = STMPRD.REQUISITION_LINE_ID 
      AND NPRL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB
     ON (NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = STMPRD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
      AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA     
     ON (NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STMPRD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
      AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
        LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_TV NFLT
      ON (STMPRD.LOCN_CD_A4 =NFLT.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE AND  END_TV_DATE=16000101  )  
     LEFT OUTER  JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT) NFP
      ON(STMPRD.PROJECT_CD_A8=NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE) 
     LEFT OUTER  JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE ,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
           FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT_TV WHERE END_TV_DATE=16000101 ) NFST
      ON (STMPRD.ACCT_CD_A6 =NFST.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AND STMPRD.SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7=NFST.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE  ) 
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
     ON(STMPRD.COMPANY_A3= NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND STMPRD.DEPARTMENT_CD_A5=NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN  (
SELECT BK_COMPANY_CODE,BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE ORDER BY BK_COMPANY_CODE) = 1) NFD1 
	ON NFD1.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = STMPRD.ATTRIBUTE14
	
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
   SMPRLD.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY AS PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY,
   EXMPRD.DISTRIBUTION_NUM AS BK_PR_LINE_DISTRIB_NUM_INT,
   NPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY AS PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY,
   NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS EXPENSE_OR_ASSET_GL_ACCT_KEY,
   'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
   EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE15 AS CIP_NUMER,
   EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE3 AS OFFSET_GLA_COMPANY_CD,
   EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE4 AS OFFSET_GLA_FINANCIAL_LOCN_CD,
   EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE6 AS OFFSET_GLA_FINANCIAL_ACCT_CD,
   EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE8 AS OFFSET_GLA_PROJECT_CD,
   EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE7 AS OFFSET_GLA_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
   EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE5 AS OFFSET_GLA_DEPARTMENT_CD,
   EXMPRD.DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT,
   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD ,
   EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE14 AS BK_ORIGINAL_DEPT_CD,
   NFD1.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS BK_ORIGINAL_COMPANY_CD   
  FROM
               (
     SELECT 
     DISTRIBUTION_ID,
     GLOBAL_NAME,
     DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
     SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
     CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
     ATTRIBUTE15,
     ATTRIBUTE3,
     ATTRIBUTE4,
     ATTRIBUTE6,
     ATTRIBUTE8,
     ATTRIBUTE7,
     ATTRIBUTE5,
     REQUISITION_LINE_ID,
	 ATTRIBUTE14
     FROM $$EXCEPDB. EX_PO_REQ_DISTRIBUTIONS
    ) EXMPRD  
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EXMPRD.GLOBAL_NAME)
    INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB SMPRLD
     ON (SMPRLD.SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT=EXMPRD.DISTRIBUTION_ID
          AND SMPRLD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL
     ON (NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT = EXMPRD.REQUISITION_LINE_ID 
      AND NPRL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB
     ON (NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EXMPRD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
      AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA   
     ON (NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = EXMPRD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
      AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
        INNER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_TV NFLT
      ON (EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE4 =NFLT.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE AND  END_TV_DATE=16000101  )  
     INNER  JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT) NFP
      ON(EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE8=NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE) 
     INNER  JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE ,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
           FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT_TV WHERE END_TV_DATE=16000101 ) NFST
      ON (EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE6 =NFST.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AND EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE7=NFST.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE  ) 
       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
     ON(EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE3= NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE5=NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)                     
	 INNER JOIN  (
SELECT BK_COMPANY_CODE,BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE ORDER BY BK_COMPANY_CODE) = 1) NFD1 
	ON NFD1.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = EXMPRD.ATTRIBUTE14

SELECT 
  SMPRDA.BATCH_ID
 ,SMPRDA.ATTRIBUTE15
 ,SMPRDA.COMPANY_A3 AS ATTRIBUTE3
 ,SMPRDA.LOCN_CD_A4 AS ATTRIBUTE4a
 ,SMPRDA.DEPARTMENT_CD_A5 AS ATTRIBUTE5
 ,SMPRDA.ACCT_CD_A6 AS ATTRIBUTE6
 ,SMPRDA.SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7 AS ATTRIBUTE7
 ,SMPRDA.PROJECT_CD_A8 AS ATTRIBUTE8 
 ,SMPRDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
 ,SMPRDA.CREATED_BY
 ,SMPRDA.CREATION_DATE 
 ,SMPRDA.DISTRIBUTION_ID
 ,SMPRDA.DISTRIBUTION_NUM
 ,SMPRDA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
 ,SMPRDA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
 ,SMPRDA.ORG_ID  
 ,SMPRDA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID
 ,SMPRDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
 ,SMPRDA.GES_UPDATE_DATE
 ,SMPRDA.GLOBAL_NAME
 ,SMPRDA.CREATE_DATETIME
 ,SMPRDA.ACTION_CODE
 ,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
 ,SMPRDA.ATTRIBUTE14
 FROM 
 (
  SELECT 
    BATCH_ID
   ,ATTRIBUTE15
   ,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE3,'UNK') COMPANY_A3
   ,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE4,'UNK') LOCN_CD_A4
   ,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOW') DEPARTMENT_CD_A5
   ,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE6,'UNKNO') ACCT_CD_A6
   ,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE7,'UNK') SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7
   ,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE8,'UNKNOW') PROJECT_CD_A8
   ,CODE_COMBINATION_ID
   ,CREATED_BY
   ,CREATION_DATE 
   ,DISTRIBUTION_ID
   ,DISTRIBUTION_NUM
   ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE
   ,LAST_UPDATED_BY
   ,ORG_ID  
   ,REQUISITION_LINE_ID
   ,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
   ,GES_UPDATE_DATE
   ,GLOBAL_NAME
   ,CREATE_DATETIME
   ,ACTION_CODE,
   ATTRIBUTE14
  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_REQ_DISTRIBUTI_ALL )SMPRDA
 WHERE 
 (   NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     WHERE       NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMPRDA.GLOBAL_NAME
      AND NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT = SMPRDA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID 
      AND NPRL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
  OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
      $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
              WHERE     SMPRDA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
      AND NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = SMPRDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
      AND NGLA.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
      AND NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SMPRDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
      AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
      AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
  OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_TV NFLT
        WHERE SMPRDA.LOCN_CD_A4 =NFLT.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE AND END_TV_DATE=16000101 )
  OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT) NFP
         WHERE SMPRDA.PROJECT_CD_A8=NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE)
  OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  (SELECT DISTINCT BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE ,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
              FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT_TV WHERE END_TV_DATE=16000101 ) NFST
                      WHERE SMPRDA.ACCT_CD_A6 =NFST.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AND SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7=NFST.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE  ) 
  OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
              WHERE SMPRDA.COMPANY_A3= NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND SMPRDA.DEPARTMENT_CD_A5=NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)

 )

SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY STMPRDA.DISTRIBUTION_ID,STMPRDA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY,
STMPRDA.DISTRIBUTION_ID,STMPRDA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM (
SELECT DISTRIBUTION_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_REQ_DISTRIBUTI_ALL STMPRD,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMPRD.GLOBAL_NAME

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTRIBUTION_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_REQ_DISTRIBUTIONS STMPRD,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMPRD.GLOBAL_NAME) STMPRDA,
(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB) SMPLD
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB SMPRLD
WHERE SMPRLD.SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT=STMPRDA.DISTRIBUTION_ID
AND SMPRLD.SS_CD=STMPRDA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
)

SELECT SCPRDA.DISTRIBUTION_ID,SCPRDA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,SCPRDA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,SCPRDA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID,SCPRDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,SCPRDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,SCPRDA.DISTRIBUTION_NUM,SCPRDA.REQ_LINE_QUANTITY,SCPRDA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,SCPRDA.CREATION_DATE,SCPRDA.CREATED_BY,SCPRDA.ENCUMBERED_FLAG,SCPRDA.GL_ENCUMBERED_DATE,SCPRDA.GL_ENCUMBERED_PERIOD_NAME,SCPRDA.GL_CANCELLED_DATE,SCPRDA.FAILED_FUNDS_LOOKUP_CODE,SCPRDA.ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,SCPRDA.BUDGET_ACCOUNT_ID,SCPRDA.ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID,SCPRDA.VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID,SCPRDA.PREVENT_ENCUMBRANCE_FLAG,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE1,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE2, SCPRDA.COMPANY_A3 AS ATTRIBUTE3,SCPRDA.LOCN_CD_A4 AS ATTRIBUTE4
,SCPRDA.DEPARTMENT_CD_A5 AS ATTRIBUTE5,SCPRDA.ACCT_CD_A6 AS 
ATTRIBUTE6,SCPRDA.SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7 AS ATTRIBUTE7
,SCPRDA.PROJECT_CD_A8 AS ATTRIBUTE8,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE9,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE10,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE11,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE12,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE13,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE14,SCPRDA.ATTRIBUTE15,SCPRDA.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,SCPRDA.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT,SCPRDA.REQUEST_ID,SCPRDA.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,SCPRDA.PROGRAM_ID,SCPRDA.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,SCPRDA.PROJECT_ID,SCPRDA.TASK_ID,SCPRDA.END_ITEM_UNIT_NUMBER,SCPRDA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE,SCPRDA.PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,SCPRDA.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID,SCPRDA.GL_CLOSED_DATE,SCPRDA.SOURCE_REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,SCPRDA.ALLOCATION_TYPE,SCPRDA.ALLOCATION_VALUE,SCPRDA.PROJECT_RELATED_FLAG,SCPRDA.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE,SCPRDA.ORG_ID,SCPRDA.AWARD_ID,SCPRDA.RECOVERABLE_TAX,SCPRDA.NONRECOVERABLE_TAX,SCPRDA.RECOVERY_RATE,SCPRDA.TAX_RECOVERY_OVERRIDE_FLAG,SCPRDA.OKE_CONTRACT_LINE_ID,SCPRDA.OKE_CONTRACT_DELIVERABLE_ID,SCPRDA.REQ_LINE_AMOUNT,SCPRDA.REQ_LINE_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,SCPRDA.REQ_AWARD_ID,SCPRDA.EVENT_ID,SCPRDA.GES_UPDATE_DATE,SCPRDA.GLOBAL_NAME,SCPRDA.BATCH_ID,SCPRDA.CREATE_DATETIME,SCPRDA.ACTION_CODE, 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
	SELECT 
		DISTRIBUTION_ID,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,LAST_UPDATED_BY,REQUISITION_LINE_ID,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,CODE_COMBINATION_ID,DISTRIBUTION_NUM,REQ_LINE_QUANTITY,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,CREATION_DATE,CREATED_BY,ENCUMBERED_FLAG,GL_ENCUMBERED_DATE,GL_ENCUMBERED_PERIOD_NAME,GL_CANCELLED_DATE,FAILED_FUNDS_LOOKUP_CODE,ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,BUDGET_ACCOUNT_ID,ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID,VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID,PREVENT_ENCUMBRANCE_FLAG,ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,ATTRIBUTE1,ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE9,ATTRIBUTE10,ATTRIBUTE11,ATTRIBUTE12,ATTRIBUTE13,ATTRIBUTE14,ATTRIBUTE15,USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT,REQUEST_ID,PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,PROGRAM_ID,PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,PROJECT_ID,TASK_ID,END_ITEM_UNIT_NUMBER,EXPENDITURE_TYPE,PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID,GL_CLOSED_DATE,SOURCE_REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,ALLOCATION_TYPE,ALLOCATION_VALUE,PROJECT_RELATED_FLAG,EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE,ORG_ID,AWARD_ID,RECOVERABLE_TAX,NONRECOVERABLE_TAX,RECOVERY_RATE,TAX_RECOVERY_OVERRIDE_FLAG,OKE_CONTRACT_LINE_ID,OKE_CONTRACT_DELIVERABLE_ID,REQ_LINE_AMOUNT,REQ_LINE_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,REQ_AWARD_ID,EVENT_ID,GES_UPDATE_DATE,GLOBAL_NAME,BATCH_ID,CREATE_DATETIME,ACTION_CODE,
		COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE3,'UNK') COMPANY_A3
		,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE4,'UNK') LOCN_CD_A4
		,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOW') DEPARTMENT_CD_A5
		,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE6,'UNKNO') ACCT_CD_A6
		,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE7,'UNK') SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7
		,COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE8,'UNKNOW') PROJECT_CD_A8
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_REQ_DISTRIBUTIONS )  SCPRDA

WHERE 
(NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
				WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCPRDA.GLOBAL_NAME)
 OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB SMPRLD, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
				WHERE SMPRLD.SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT=SCPRDA.DISTRIBUTION_ID
			   		 AND SMPRLD.SS_CD=NSSC1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)	
 OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC2
				WHERE NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT = SCPRDA.REQUISITION_LINE_ID 
					AND NPRL.SS_CD = NSSC2.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)	
 OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB,  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC3
				WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCPRDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
					AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC3.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)	
 OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB1   
				WHERE NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = SCPRDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
					AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB1.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)	)

SELECT 
		SMPRLD.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY AS PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY,
		STMPRD.DISTRIBUTION_NUM AS BK_PR_LINE_DISTRIB_NUM_INT,
		NPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY AS PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY,
		NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS EXPENSE_OR_ASSET_GL_ACCT_KEY,
		'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
		STMPRD.ATTRIBUTE15 AS CIP_NUMER,
		STMPRD.COMPANY_A3 AS OFFSET_GLA_COMPANY_CD,
		STMPRD.LOCN_CD_A4 AS OFFSET_GLA_FINANCIAL_LOCN_CD,
		STMPRD.ACCT_CD_A6 AS OFFSET_GLA_FINANCIAL_ACCT_CD,
		STMPRD.PROJECT_CD_A8 AS OFFSET_GLA_PROJECT_CD,
		STMPRD.SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7 AS OFFSET_GLA_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
		STMPRD.DEPARTMENT_CD_A5 AS OFFSET_GLA_DEPARTMENT_CD,
		STMPRD.DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT,
		NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD   
	FROM
	             (
				SELECT 
				DISTRIBUTION_ID,
				GLOBAL_NAME,
				DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
				SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
				CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
				ATTRIBUTE15,
				COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE3,'UNK') COMPANY_A3,
				COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE4,'UNK') LOCN_CD_A4,
				COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE6,'UNKNO') ACCT_CD_A6,
				COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE8,'UNKNOW') PROJECT_CD_A8,
				COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE7,'UNK') SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7,
				COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOW') DEPARTMENT_CD_A5,
				REQUISITION_LINE_ID
				FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_REQ_DISTRIBUTIONS
				UNION ALL
				SELECT 
				DISTRIBUTION_ID,
				GLOBAL_NAME,
				DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
				SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
				CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
				ATTRIBUTE15,
				ATTRIBUTE3,
				ATTRIBUTE4,
				ATTRIBUTE6,
				ATTRIBUTE8,
				ATTRIBUTE7,
				ATTRIBUTE5,
				REQUISITION_LINE_ID
				FROM $$EXCEPDB. EX_CG1_PO_REQ_DISTRIBUTIONS
			) STMPRD  
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
				ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMPRD.GLOBAL_NAME)
			INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB SMPRLD
				ON (SMPRLD.SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT=STMPRD.DISTRIBUTION_ID
			   		 AND SMPRLD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
			INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL
				ON (NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT = STMPRD.REQUISITION_LINE_ID 
					AND NPRL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
			INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB
				ON (NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = STMPRD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
					AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
			INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA   
				ON (NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STMPRD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
					AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
	 	    LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_TV NFLT
	 			ON (STMPRD.LOCN_CD_A4 =NFLT.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE AND  END_TV_DATE=16000101  )  
	 		LEFT OUTER  JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT BK_PROJECT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT) NFP
	 			ON(STMPRD.PROJECT_CD_A8=NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE) 
	 		LEFT OUTER  JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE ,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
	 								FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT_TV WHERE END_TV_DATE=16000101 ) NFST
	 			ON (STMPRD.ACCT_CD_A6 =NFST.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AND STMPRD.SUBACCOUNT_CD_A7=NFST.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE  ) 
		   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
				ON(STMPRD.COMPANY_A3= NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND STMPRD.DEPARTMENT_CD_A5=NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
